hero.description: Web developer who turns ideas into fast, modern, and functional websites.
hero.experience: With over 8 years of experience, I help companies and professionals launch their projects with quality, performance, and modern design.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Developer with 8 years of experience in building high-impact digital solutions. My passion is transforming ideas into modern, intuitive, and functional interfaces that connect people and businesses.

experience.description: Responsible for the complete migration of the CMS from the Hygraph (GraphCMS) platform to Sanity, restructuring the entire content architecture and refactoring the front-end in Next.js to ensure performance, scalability, and ease of maintenance.
Development of front-end solutions for the Stellantis Group, focusing on optimized and high-performance components using NextJS, SEO, and DataLayer.
Worked as a Full Stack developer, creating modern interfaces in ReactJS with NodeJS API, Context API, and Styled Components.

items.title: Landing Page – Jeep Renegade
items.description: Creation of a highly optimized landing page for Jeep Renegade, prioritizing SEO, responsiveness, and tracking via Google Tag Manager. The project used reusable components and efficient media loading.

items.title: Landing Page – Jeep Compass
items.description: Development of the official Jeep Compass landing page, focusing on performance, SEO, and responsiveness. Features include image optimization, smart loading, accessible code, and integration with Google Tag Manager (DataLayer).

items.title: Landing Page – Fiat Titano
items.description: Development of the official landing page for the Fiat Titano model, focused on performance, responsiveness, and SEO. Features include lazy loading, image compression, semantic structure, and Google Tag Manager (DataLayer) integration for metrics analysis.

items.title: Sales and Financial Dashboard (Preview Unavailable)
items.description: Complete development of an admin panel for managing sales, withdrawals, and advances. The project includes 2FA authentication, advanced filters, dynamic charts, financial reports, and permission control. Modern and responsive interface focused on performance and user experience.

items.title: CMS for Peugeot Casacor Event
items.description: Led the development of a complete CMS for a Peugeot event. Built a robust API with authentication, protected routes, content management, and media uploads.

items.title: CMS Migration to Sanity
items.description: Full migration from Hygraph CMS to Sanity, including content restructuring and frontend refactoring in Next.js, focused on performance, scalability, and SEO.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below. I'm available for new projects, partnerships, or just a chat about technology.
